subject: {{colleague_name}} suggested I reach out
email_body:
Hey {{first_name}},

I was in touch with {{colleague_name}} about influencer data at {{company_name}} — they pointed me to you as the right person.

We give agencies direct access to 450M+ creator profiles across Instagram, TikTok, YouTube and 7 other networks — unified, no scraping required.

Worth a 15-min call?

{{sender_name}}

subject: Re: {{colleague_name}} suggested I reach out
email_body:
Hey {{first_name}},

Following up quickly — the thing most agencies tell us saves them the most time is being able to pull real audience data on any creator across platforms without waiting on a vendor.

If that's relevant to what {{company_name}} is doing right now, happy to show it live.

{{sender_name}}

subject: Re: {{colleague_name}} suggested I reach out
email_body:
Hey {{first_name}},

Last note from me — if influencer data isn't a priority right now, no problem at all.
